data.body: AC ADR-number correction: the AC named ADR 0020, but 0020 was taken by the two-vote-CI-gate ADR (epic 1fa8) that landed first, so the completion-aware ADR is filed as docs/adr/0024-completion-aware-container-plan-review.md (content complete; cross-refs added to ADR 0008/0002). Updated the AC's 0020 references to 0024 to match the delivered artifact.
